title: Sunday Shopping in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Most regular shops are closed on Sundays** — supermarkets, malls, and clothing stores all shut by law.
**Next official city-wide shopping Sundays in 2026:** 6 December and 20 December. Berlin.de lists both as city-wide Sunday openings, with the legal window usually 1 PM to 8 PM.
Forgot groceries? Head to a **train station supermarket** (REWE at Hauptbahnhof, Edeka at Friedrichstraße, and more) — all open 365 days a year.
**REWE at BER airport is open 24/7** — the only true 24-hour supermarket in the Berlin area.
Spätis, bakeries, gas stations, and restaurants can help, but **cash still matters** for small Sunday purchases and late kiosk stops.
Sunday in Berlin is better for **museums, flea markets, walking tours, and long brunches** than for shopping.
